[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A game scoreboard overlay sits over a blurred outdoor scene, showing two team columns of player names and performance stats.

Main Subject: A large, semi-transparent scoreboard table with two team sections labeled “Tim Aku” and “Tim Musuh,” listing multiple players in rows and showing numerical statistics across several categories.

Setting: The background appears to be an outdoor area with a large building or structure behind the overlay, and a sky with clouds. The scene is blurred and dimmed by the overlay, suggesting a daytime setting with natural light.

Visual Details: The composition is dominated by the centered scoreboard panel. The panel has a dark, nearly black background with blue-highlighted elements for the left side and gray/green/orange bars for different statistics. Each row includes a small square avatar image on the left, followed by a player name and a set of numbers and colored percentage bars across columns labeled at the top. At the bottom center, there is a yellow banner-like notification that includes an icon and the text “STREAK KNOCKDOWN x3.” The top portion of the screen shows large, stylized yellow text “MENANG” and smaller white text “BOOYAH!” beneath it. On the upper left, white text reads “CLASH SQUAD” and below it “BERMUDA.” Near the bottom left, there are small UI icons on a dark strip. On the bottom right, a white rectangular button reads “LOBBY.” The camera view is straight-on, as if captured from the game menu or results screen, with the overlay centered and spanning much of the screen.

Visible Text: CLASH SQUAD
BERMUDA
MENANG
BOOYAH !
Tim Aku
Tim Musuh
A1MFROMDILZY
-PriɲcePizz★
NMR-RAFX
pizul
nyawit
STREAK KNOCKDOWN x3
LOBBY

Practical Summary: The image shows a video game victory/results screen with a scoreboard comparing two teams’ player statistics. It also displays “MENANG” and “BOOYAH!” along with a “STREAK KNOCKDOWN x3” notification and a “LOBBY” button.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
